title.ko: 유체수단에 의하여 작동하는 계 일반; 유체압 액튜에이터, 예. 서보모터; 달리 분류되지 않는 유체압계의 세부(모터, 터빈, 압축기, 송풍기, 펌프 F01 ～ F04; 유체동력학 F15D , 작유체클러치 또는 유체브레이크 F16D; 유체스프링; F16F; 유체전동장치 F16H; 피스톤, 실린더, 패킹 F16J; 밸브, 마개, 콕, 조작용의 플로트 F16K; 주밸브 보조유동에 의하여 작동되는 안전밸브 F16K 17/10; 밸브의 유체작동장치 F16K 31/12; 관, 관이음 F16L; 윤활 F16N)
title.en: SYSTEMS ACTING BY MEANS OF FLUIDS IN GENERAL; FLUID-PRESSURE ACTUATORS, e.g. SERVOMOTORS; DETAILS OF FLUID-PRESSURE SYSTEMS, NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR

definition.ko: 압축 유체를 공급하는 것 F15B1/00 증압기 또는 유체압 전환기 F15B3/00; F15B5/00 유체압 액튜에이터 시스템 텔레모터 또는 펌프의 출력과 관련된 시스템 F15B7/00 서보모터 F15B9/00, F15B11/00, F15B13/00 부재를 이동시키기 위한 장치 F15B15/00 텔레모터와 서보모터의 조합; 기타 시스템; 세부 F15B17/00; F15B18/00; F15B21/00 시험; 안전 F15B19/00; F15B20/00

title.ko: 어큐뮬레이터에 의한 시스템 또는 장치 공급조 또는 배액탱크장치(sump assemblies)
title.en: Installations or systems with accumulators; Supply reservoir or sump assemblies

title.ko: 어큐뮬레이터에 의한 시스템 또는 장치
title.en: Installations or systems with accumulators
having accumulator charging devices
with electrical control means

title.ko: 어큐뮬레이터
title.en: Accumulators

title.ko: 가스쿠션을 이용하는 것; 가스충전장치; 그것의 부구(float) 또는 계기
title.en: using a gas cushion; Gas charging devices; Indicators or floats therefor

title.ko: 유동분리수단을 갖는 것
title.en: with flexible separating means

title.ko: 그 주위에 부착되는 것
title.en: attached at their periphery  (flexible separating means in the form of a tube F15B0001160000)
by means of a rigid annular supporting member
in the form of a tube
Anti-extrusion means
fixed to the separating means
Liquid port constructions
with rigid separating means, e.g. pistons
Supply reservoir or sump assemblies
Intensifiers or fluid-pressure converters, e.g. pressure exchangers; Conveying pressure from one fluid system to another, without contact between the fluids

title.ko: 물리량의 변화를 변환하는 변환기, 예. 부재의 위치의 변화에 의하여 표현되는 것을 유체압의 변화로 또는 그의 역으로 변환하는 것; 유체압을 다수의 유체압의 변화 또는 다른 양의 변화 함수로 변화시키는 것(F15B9/00이 우선)
title.en: Transducers converting variations of physical quantities, e.g. expressed by variations in positions of members, into fluid-pressure variations or vice versa; Varying fluid pressure as a function of variations of a plurality of fluid pressures or variations of other quantities (F15B0009000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 발생되는 동작이 용적형펌프의 출력에 명확히 관련된 유체압 작동 시스템; 텔레모터
title.en: Fluid-pressure actuator systems

title.ko: 발생되는 동작이 용적형펌프의 출력에 명확히 관련된 유체압 작동 시스템; 텔레모터
title.en: Fluid-pressure actuator systems in which the movement produced is definitely related to the output of a volumetric pump; Telemotors
Systems with continuously-operating input and output apparatus
in which the ratio between pump stroke and motor stroke varies with the resistance against the motor

title.ko: 세부(F15B 15/00이 우선)
title.en: Details (F15B0015000000 takes precedence)
Input units; Master units

title.ko: 원예용 절취용구; 입목의 전정(가지치기 장치 A01G23/095)
title.en: Compensation of the liquid content in a system  (F15B0007080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 추종동작을 하는 서보모터, 즉 그의 피동작부재의 위치가 제어부재의 위치에 따르는 것
title.en: Servomotors with follow-up action, i.e. in which the position of the actuated member conforms with that of the controlling member

title.ko: 왕복운동형 또는 요동형(oscillatable type)의 서보모터를 갖는 것
title.en: with servomotors of the reciprocatable or oscillatable type
with electrical control means
controlled by varying the output of a pump with variable capacity
controlled by means using a fluid jet
with electrical control means

title.ko: 서보모터의 유체공급량 또는 유체유출량에 영향을 주는 밸브에 의하여 제어되는 것(F15B 9/06이 우선)
title.en: controlled by valves affecting the fluid feed or the fluid outlet of the servomotor (F15B0009060000 takes precedence)
with electrical control means
in which the controlling element and the servomotor each controls a separate member, these members influencing different fluid passages or the same passage
in which both the controlling element and the servomotor control the same member influencing a fluid passage and are connected to that member by means of a differential gearing
with rotary servomotors
Systems essentially having two or more interacting servomotors
with electrical control means

title.ko: 추종동작을 하지 않는 서보모터 시스템(F15B 3/00이 우선)
title.en: Servomotor systems without provision for follow-up action (F15B0003000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 출력부재의 속도 또는 작동력 또는 속도를 제어하기 위한 특이 요소를 기본적으로 포함하는 시스템
title.en: Systems essentially incorporating special features for controlling the speed or the actuating force or speed of an output member
by means of differential connection of the servomotor lines, e.g. regenerative circuits

title.ko: 작동력의 제어를 위한 것(F15B 11/024가 우선)
title.en: for controlling the actuating force (F15B0011024000 takes precedence)
by means of fluid-pressure converters
by means of servomotors having a plurality of working chambers

title.ko: 속도제어를 목적으로 하는 것(F15B 11/024가 우선)
title.en: for controlling the speed (F15B0011024000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 공급선로 수단에 의한 것 (F15B 11/046, F15B 11/05 우선)
title.en: by means in the feed line (F15B0011046000, F15B0011050000 take precedence)

title.ko: 귀환선로 수단에 의한 것 (F15B 11/046, F15B 11/05 우선)
title.en: by means in the return line (F15B0011046000, F15B0011050000 take precedence)
depending on the position of the working member
with deceleration control
specially adapted to maintain constant speed, e.g. pressure-compensated, load-responsive
involving features specific to the use of a compressible medium, e.g. air, steam
with devices for saving the compressible medium
with valves for gradually putting pneumatic systems under pressure
Combined pneumatic-hydraulic systems
with pneumatic drive or displacement and speed control or stopping by hydraulic braking
with only one servomotor
in which the servomotor position is a function of the pressure
providing distinct intermediate positions; with step-by-step action
using chambers of predetermined volume
with special provision for automatic return
with two or more servomotors
using two or more pumps
used in combination for obtaining stepwise operation of a single controlled member
controlling several interacting or sequentially-operating members
Synchronisation of the movement of two or more servomotors

title.ko: 서보모터계의 세부 사항(F15B 15/00이 우선)
title.en: Details of servomotor systems (F15B0015000000 takes precedence)
Locking-valves or other detent devices
Fluid distribution or supply devices characterised by their adaptation to the control of servomotors
for use with a single servomotor
operated by fluid pressure
with electrically-controlled pilot valves
operated by electrically-controlled means, e.g. solenoids, torque-motors
for use with two or more servomotors
in distinct sequence
Assemblies of units, each for the control of a single servomotor only
Special arrangements for operating the actuated device without using fluid pressure, e.g. for emergency use
Special measures for increasing the sensitivity of the system
Special measures for giving the operator by sense of touch the immediate response of the actuated device
Special measures for feedback
Fluid-actuated devices for displacing a member from one position to another; Gearing associated therewith
Mechanical layout characterised by the means for converting the movement of the fluid-actuated element into movement of the finally-operated member
with oscillating cylinder
for mechanically converting rectilinear movement into non-rectilinear movement
characterised by the construction of the motor unit
the motor being of diaphragm type
of the oscillating-vane or curved-cylinder type
of the straight-cylinder type
of the telescopic type
of differential-piston type
Combined units comprising both motor and pump
Pyrotechnical actuators
Other details
for accelerating or decelerating the stroke
for restricting the stroke
Locking mechanisms
Means for indicating the position, e.g. end of stroke
Combinations of telemotor and servomotor systems
in which a telemotor operates the control member of a servomotor
Parallel arrangements of independent servomotor systems
Testing fluid-pressure actuator systems or apparatus, so far as not provided for elsewhere
Safety arrangements for fluid actuator systems; Applications of safety devices in fluid actuator systems; Emergency measures for fluid actuator systems

title.ko: 유체 작동 시스템의 일반적 특징; 이 서브클래스의 다른 어느 그룹에도 포함 되지 않는 유체압 작동 시스템의 세부
title.en: Common features of fluid actuator systems; Fluid-pressure actuator systems or details thereof, not covered by any other group of this subclass
Servomotor systems with program control derived from a store or timing device; Control devices therefor
Special measures taken in connection with the properties of the fluid
Removal or measurement of solid or liquid contamination, e.g. filtering
Controlling the temperature of the fluid
Cooling
Heating
Removal or measurement of undissolved gas, e.g. de-aeration, venting or bleeding
Compensating for variations in viscosity or temperature
Preventing foaming, churning or cavitation
Arrangements for compressed air preparation, e.g. comprising air driers, air condensers, filters, lubricators or pressure regulators
Use of special fluids, e.g. liquid metal; Special adaptations of fluid-pressure systems, or control of elements therefor, to the use of such fluids

title.ko: 전기적으로 작동하는 제어수단을 포함하는 서보모터시스템(F15B 21/02가 우선)
title.en: Servomotor systems incorporating electrically- operated control means (F15B0021020000 takes precedence)
Delay devices or arrangements
Fluid oscillators or pulse generators
Energy-recuperation means
